## Title Validation
*(e.g. feat: [TICKET NUMBER] Added a button -> ELIB-234 Added a button. If no ticket, just remove the [TICKET NUMBER]. You can combine intents like feat/fix: Added a button)*

## Description
*(Description should answer what (happened) and why (did you do it) instead of how.)*

## Primary Intent
- [x] **feat** (New feature)
- [ ] **fix** (Bug fix)
- [ ] **docs** (Documentation)
- [ ] **style** (Formatting)
- [ ] **refactor** (Code improvement)
- [ ] **test** (Tests)
- [ ] **chore** (Maintenance)

## Mixed Changes (If applicable)
- [ ] Includes minor fixes
- [ ] Includes documentation updates
- [ ] Includes styling cleanup

*Details:*

## Related Issue
Resolves: 

## Screenshots (Optional)
